n_estimators.description: Number of boosting rounds (trees) to build.

max_depth.description: Maximum depth of each tree; deeper trees capture more interactions but risk overfitting.

learning_rate.description: Step-size shrinkage applied to each tree's contribution.

subsample.description: Fraction of training rows sampled per boosting round.

colsample_bytree.description: Fraction of features sampled when constructing each tree.

min_child_weight.description: Minimum sum of instance weight needed in a child node.
